short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $6.96B in FY2026 Q1, +4.4% YoY — stable trajectory entering the next print.
Next-quarter consensus: $7.40B (+6.3% vs current Q) — set by 26 broker contributors.
EPS consensus next qtr: $2.10 vs current $1.61.
Margin context: 29.0% net margin (37.2% op margin) — expansion likely.
Next earnings: 2026-08-07 — primary catalyst for the short-term window.
short_term.takeaway: Going into the next earnings print, the setup is constructive — consensus is achievable based on current run-rate.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $30B — in cyclical drawdown.
Sell-side: FY1 $30B → FY2 $31B (+4.4% multi-year top-line implied).
Forward EBIT margin: 27.0% — structural premium business over the long-cycle view.
7-quarter run-rate CAGR: +0.1% — the secular trajectory the market is pricing.
Sector thesis (Health Care): GLP-1 / specialty pipeline and patent cliff dynamics define the 3-year setup.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if the next 2–4 quarters confirm a stabilization in trajectory.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 54.6% — elevated (premium-selling favored).
Put/Call OI: 0.56 — call-heavy positioning (consensus bullish).
30-day implied move: ±6.2% ($126.01 – $142.71) — the 1-σ range the options market is pricing.
ATM skew: +32.07pp — put skew (downside hedges bid).
Front-month OI cluster: $140.0 — likely magnet / pin-risk for expiry.
short_term.strategy: Calendar spread at $134 strike: short 30 DTE / long 60 DTE. Mid IV, range-bound → harvest near-term theta while keeping back-month optionality.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ DTE · LEAPS / structural)
bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 29.6% across 8 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 8 dates spanning 91–609 DTE.
90-day implied move: ±14.7% ($114.63 – $154.09).
391-day implied move: ±30.6% ($93.19 – $175.53) — the long-dated 1-σ range.
Sell-side PT vs options-implied range: consensus $105 (-21.9% upside). Compare to the 90+ DTE implied range above.
Term structure in backwardation (-25.0pp front→back) — near-term event premium; long-dated vol cheaper.
long_term.strategy: Sell 6-month strangle: short $121 put / short $148 call. Range-bound + high IV → premium-selling on both sides; profits if spot stays within ±10%; manage with rolls or assignment.
